name: riscv-dump-asm
description: Syntax highlighting and navigation support for RISC-V objdump-style disassembly files.

riscvDumpAsm.format.enabled.description: Enable document and range formatting for RISC-V disassembly files.

riscvDumpAsm.format.alignAddresses.description: Right-align instruction addresses before the colon.

riscvDumpAsm.format.addressWidth.description: Minimum width used when aligning instruction addresses.

riscvDumpAsm.format.alignMachineCode.description: Align machine code at a fixed column.

riscvDumpAsm.format.machineCodeColumn.description: Zero-based column for machine code when machine-code alignment is enabled.

riscvDumpAsm.format.alignMnemonics.description: Align instruction mnemonics at a fixed column.

riscvDumpAsm.format.mnemonicColumn.description: Zero-based column for instruction mnemonics when mnemonic alignment is enabled.

riscvDumpAsm.format.alignOperands.description: Align operands at a fixed column.

riscvDumpAsm.format.operandsColumn.description: Zero-based column for operands when operand alignment is enabled.

riscvDumpAsm.format.alignComments.description: Align comments at a fixed column.

riscvDumpAsm.format.commentColumn.description: Zero-based column for comments when comment alignment is enabled.

riscvDumpAsm.format.spaceAfterComma.description: Insert one space after operand commas when operand-field alignment is disabled.

riscvDumpAsm.format.alignOperandFields.description: Align comma-separated operand fields, useful for lining up register operands.

riscvDumpAsm.format.operandFieldWidth.description: Column stride for operand fields when operand-field alignment is enabled.

riscvDumpAsm.format.operandFieldWidths.description: Per-operand field widths used when operand-field alignment is enabled. For example, [6, 10, 8] places the second operand at column 6 and the third operand at column 16 within the operand field. Leave empty to use operandFieldWidth for every field.
